matchingMethod: Token-set overlap on normalized lowercased queries with stopword removal and synonym normalization (obamacare→aca, fpl→poverty, ssa/ss→social security, etc.). Match labels: 'exact' = identical token sets; 'semantic' = Jaccard ≥ 0.5 with ≥2 shared content tokens, OR overlap-coefficient ≥ 0.7; 'partial' = overlap-coef ≥ 0.5 with ≥2 shared tokens. Provider rate uses exact+semantic only.

summary.recommendation: Use OpenAI fan-out as primary signal for new content (highest match-to-Bing rate). Treat Anthropic queries as solid second-opinion. Treat Gemini fan-out as a creativity layer that surfaces edge cases Bing rarely fires on (low precision, high recall). For any topic where geography or program enrollment matters (Medicaid, SNAP, WIC), generate state-specific permutations explicitly — Bing decomposes those heavily and our LLM proxies do not.
